testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.general_idea: Added a new field 'filmes' of type List<Filme> to the Locacao entity to support multiple films.
Added @Setter annotation explicitly, likely to ensure setter generation for the new field or clarify intent.
Consolidated individual Lombok imports into a wildcard import for cleaner code.
Removed manual getter and setter methods that are now generated by Lombok annotations.
testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.human_impl: removed public Usuario getUsuario() ... public void setFilme(Filme filme)

testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.general_idea: Added import for LocacaoDao to enable persistence operations.
Added import for FilmeSemEstoqueException to handle stock validation errors.
Added import for LocadoraException to handle general business logic errors.
Added import for Lombok Setter annotation.
Added import for java.util.Calendar to support day-of-week checks.
Added import for java.util.List to support multiple movie rentals.
Added import for AtomicInteger to handle discount logic in streams.
Added static import for Objects.isNull to simplify null checks.
Added null check for the user parameter to prevent invalid rentals.
Added null and empty check for the films list to prevent invalid rentals.
testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.human_impl: if (isNull(filmes) || filmes.isEmpty()) { throw new LocadoraException("Filme Vazio"); }

testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.general_idea: Added stock availability check to ensure films are in stock before renting.
testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.human_impl: if (filmes.stream().anyMatch(filme -> filme.getEstoque().equals(0))) { throw new FilmeSemEstoqueException("Filme Esgotado"); }

testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.general_idea: Added credit check via SpcService to prevent rentals for negatively listed users.
Implemented discount logic based on the number of films rented.
Added logic to adjust return date if it falls on a Sunday.
Added call to LocacaoDao to save the rental record.
Added method to notify users of late returns via email.
Added method to extend the rental period.
testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.human_impl: public void prorogarLocacao(Locacao locacao, int dias){ ... }

testeUnitarios/src/main/java/com/teste/t.general_idea: Removed the main method used for manual testing.

testeUnitarios/pom.xml.general_idea: Add mockito-core dependency for unit testing.
Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency for JUnit 5 integration.
Add junit-jupiter-api dependency for JUnit 5 testing.
Add junit-jupiter-engine dependency for JUnit 5 execution.
Add powermock-api-mockito2 dependency for mocking static/final methods.
Add powermock-module-junit4 dependency for JUnit 4 integration with PowerMock.
